text: Crystal block attacks with an amethyst block without spending any blocks.
Crystal piercing pierces the player with amethyst shards.
Crystal volley attacks with projectiles in different directions (except up and down).
$(o)Condition:$() Within 16 blocks of amethyst geodes or clusters.
Resonating Crystal: Attacker has 12.5% chance to be stunned for 5 sec.
Crystallization: 10% chance to fully absorb incoming damage.
